behavior_surfaces: desktop provider save refresh for connected idle chat sessions
provider model context-window propagation into CLI runtime environment
context usage inspection for active sessions
generated_surfaces: artifacts/quality-runs/2026-06-04T04-49-29-138Z/report.md generated by bun run verify and not intended for commit
state_contracts: Provider config changes that affect runtime environment must be reapplied to idle connected sessions even when providerId and modelId are unchanged.
set_runtime_config messages may carry force=true to request a runtime restart for the same provider/model selection.
The server must keep same-selection runtime messages as no-op unless force=true is present.
Unknown/unconfigured custom model context windows continue to fall back to 200000.
Models with [1m] or :1m suffix resolve to a 1000000-token context window on fresh runtime lookup.

verification.evidence: Failed before the fix because force=true same-model runtime messages were ignored; passed after the WebSocket handler honored force.

verification.command: cd desktop; bun run test src/stores/providerStore.test.ts src/stores/chatStore.test.ts

verification.evidence: Report artifacts/quality-runs/2026-06-04T04-49-29-138Z/report.md: passed 3, failed 6, skipped 2. Failures were pre-existing expired quarantine windows, unrelated ActiveSession test failure, and native Cargo PermissionDenied.

known_unknowns: Human verification in the running desktop chat window is still needed to confirm the context indicator changes from 200000 to 1000000 after provider save or runtime restart.
Busy/streaming sessions are intentionally not restarted by provider save refresh; they require becoming idle or starting a fresh session.
If a custom model ID does not include [1m] or :1m, the provider model context window field still must be saved as 1000000.
user_decisions: User configured/selected the Mimo provider model and expected the chat context window to reflect a 1M context instead of 200000.
confidence_notes: Project cognition readiness for this issue was review with partial freshness; exact provider context usage ownership required live code reads.
Live code reads showed context window resolution already supports [1m], and the failing control boundary was stale CLI runtime state after provider save.
Focused RED/GREEN server and desktop store tests cover the runtime force-refresh path.

excluded: Changing model selector role semantics for haiku/sonnet/opus aliases
